name: Free Flow USA, Inc.
summary: PART I HISTORY Free Flow USA, Inc. (the "Company" or "Free Flow") was incorporated as Free Flow, Inc. on October 28, 2011, (Name changed to Free Flow USA, Inc. on May 28, 2024) under the laws of the State of Delaware to enter the green energy industry. The Company began with the idea of developing a swimming pool solar pump system to create a blend of green energy harvesting while maintaining the present system.
